code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut p = 0
mut neg = 0
mut i = 0
mut token = ""

while i <= n
  let is_end = i == n
  let b = if is_end
    0
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
  end
  let is_ws = is_end or b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      let v = match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if v > 0
        p = p + v
      else if v < 0
        neg = neg + v
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let r = p - neg
println("r=#{r}")
